calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Whithead for and with William Powers (Petitioner).

Mr. Whitehead explained that the Petitioner is one of three Sons of Josephine, that the Trust Agreement was executed between hopsital visits, that they prepared a Grant Deed transferring the property to the Trust but that Josephine passed away before executing them, and that she was to weak to execute them. Mr. Whitehead also represented to the Court that he had the original documents with him. The Petition for Order Confirming Successor Trustee and Trust Assets was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley.

Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-18-2013 Continued To Jul-02-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
